entries.title: Santander extends AI access to all employees as business value starts to kick in
entries.summary: Santander is rolling out AI access to all of its 185,000 employees as the technology starts to garner tangible results, with the Spanish bank expecting it to generate more than €200 million in business value in 2026.

entries.title: Google’s Nobel-Winning AI Expert Departing for Anthropic

entries.title: Brands Employing AI-Created Influencers on Social Media
entries.summary: Brands have reportedly begun using artificial intelligence-generated influencers to promote products on social media. That’s according to the results of an investigation by The Guardian published Sunday (June 21). The U.K. newspaper says these findings indicate that companies are using AI to generate content that purports to be an actual customer experience without letting […] The post Brand

entries.title: Santander Equips All Workers With AI and Seeks $1.15 Billion Business Value
entries.summary: Santander is extending artificial intelligence (AI) tools to all its employees as it works toward its goal of generating over 1 billion euros (about $1.15 billion) in business value from the technology between 2026 and 2028. entries.title: Has AI Impact Accelerated Beyond Expectation?
entries.summary: At the Temenos Community Forum, Patrice Amann, Regional Industry Leader, Insurance and Banking, Microsoft joined the FinextraTV studio to share his insights on the speed of impact across AI and cloud. Amann said they expected there to be more of a gradual implementation, but instead, he has witnessed a massive acceleration in adoption and positive impact. entries.title: Polymarket Reportedly Paid Creators to Promote Fake Wins
entries.summary: Polymarket reportedly paid content creators to film themselves making fake trades and scoring phony wins. entries.title: Avaloq works with group of cantonal banks on mobile services
entries.summary: A group of regional cantonal banks – Basellandschaftliche Kantonalbank, Basler Kantonalbank with Bank Cler AG, St. Galler Kantonalbank AG and Thurgauer Kantonalbank – are partnering with Avaloq to enhance mobile banking services for around one million clients in Switzerland.

entries.title: EBAday 2026: Zooming in on AI and digital assets as the key themes of the event
entries.summary: The two final panels at EBAday 2026 explored how AI systems are rapidly evolving from passive tools to autonomous agents, and recapped the highlights of this year’s events.

entries.title: The Rise of Microfinance and Inclusion in African Payments
entries.summary: In Copenhagen at the Temenos Community Forum, Santhosh Rao, Managing Director, MEA, Temenos and Mitchell Elegbe, Group CEO, Interswitch joined FinextraTV to share their insights into the African financial market. entries.title: Revolut refunds Irish customers after historic ATM glitch
entries.summary: Digital bank Revolut has refunded thousands of Irish customers following a software glitch that led to incorrect charges for ATM access fees.

entries.title: Hong Kong pilots wholesale application of CBDC in a live market environment
entries.summary: Hong Kong is piloting the use of a central bank digital currency for advance margin payments in after-hours derivatives trading.

entries.title: EBAday 2026: Correspondent banking and liquidity management in a real-time world
entries.summary: As real-time schemes and digital assets reshape banking, how do the realities of correspondent banking and liquidity management change?
